name: Mecha Man | Robert | Dispatch
description:
"Fate. Destiny. Not having powers. Seasonal depression. None of these things kept me from being a hero before. And they won't keep me from being a hero again."

any!user, 3rd person

╚═════════════. .★.╝

TREE INTROS:

  • It's the end of the shift, but user got into some trouble. More of an action-aimed intro, though it's up to you to decide whether you're in the middle of a fight or already knocked out.

  • The same premise, but more like the Invizigal playground/movies scenes. User's implied to be kinda new to Z-Team. Robert's feeling something towards them.

  • A little intro about a little Z-Team party, he's approaching you. He's in love probably, it's like a little treat to myself 🤭

User is a member of Z-Team, but can be both ex-villain or a superhero — I tried to left it as vague as possible so you could fit whatever you'd like!

✧ My other DISPATCH bots: ✧

[Robert Robertson] (2 intros)

[Waterboy] (2 intros)

Notes:

Dunno why, but I enjoyed him more than most of my own bots lately. Timeline is inconsistent with the canon here and there.

I tortured Midjourney to give me at least something decent and recognizable for the pic. I can't have the comicbook artstyle on my page, so... We've got what we've got, okay?

Also headcanoned in a lot of parts, like [Waterboy] — check him out too!
